package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for gin_handler_returns_multiple_response_shapes: Handlers that manually build several unrelated success payload shapes instead of delegating to clearer endpoints or render helpers.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule047NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule047NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule047NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario047Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule047NegativeService, input Rule047NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
